question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/service/ContractExecutionService.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: restoreGasToBucket()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a transaction that succeeds but reports gasUsed=0 in the EvmTransactionResult, causing restoreGasToBucket() to restore the full gasRemaining (gasLimit - 0 = gasLimit) back to the bucket, inflating the available throttle capacity beyond its intended limit?
